data_quality_notes: Used World Bank PM2.5 mean annual exposure (EN.ATM.PM25.MC.M3) as proxy for ground-based air pollutants.
summary: Used World Bank PM2.5 mean annual exposure as proxy for ground-based air pollutant concentrations (WAQI not accessible without API token). Pearson r=0.305 (p=2.199e-74), Spearman rho=0.183 (p=4.491e-27), n=3420 obs across 190 countries. Partial r=0.501 (p=0.0) controlling for log(GPC). Best functional form: quadratic.
